entity.summary: Cardano decentralized exchange and liquidity-aggregation protocol providing permissionless token swaps, automated-market-maker pools, best-route aggregation across Cardano DEX venues, and developer APIs and widgets.
entity.notes: Current first-party application and documentation expose active Cardano swaps, liquidity pools, an aggregator API, and a best-price aggregator widget. Current independent metrics report non-zero DEX aggregator volume, fees, and revenue. The AMM and aggregator surfaces remain one Minswap entity. No exact launch date or legal jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Minswap Aggregator API documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation exposes route estimation, fee and price-impact details, unsigned swap transaction construction, signing, and on-chain submission through the Minswap Cardano aggregator API.

evidence.title: Minswap Aggregator activity metrics
evidence.notes: Current independent protocol metrics report non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, 30-day, and cumulative Cardano DEX aggregator volume together with fees and revenue.
